entries.title: Mitosis vs Meiosis
entries.content: Mitosis: 2 identical diploid cells (growth/repair). Meiosis: 4 haploid gametes (sexual reproduction), increases genetic diversity.

entries.title: Ecosystems
entries.content: Producers (plants) → consumers (herbivores, carnivores) → decomposers. Energy flows; nutrients cycle.

entries.title: Human Digestive System
entries.content: Mouth → esophagus → stomach (acid) → small intestine (absorption) → large intestine → rectum. Enzymes break down macromolecules.

entries.title: Vaccines
entries.content: Expose immune system to weakened/inactive pathogen or fragment to build memory without severe disease.

entries.title: Genotype vs Phenotype
entries.content: Genotype: genetic makeup (alleles). Phenotype: observable traits. Environment also influences phenotype.
